title: RedTrap
description: A texturepack that marks dangerous thing often used in pvp with a red color.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/506ab400da0556f4ac0075cf3c8b28dd2995655f.png)
###  RedTrap recolors many items commonly used in pvp to make them easier to spot.
### 

Items recolored:

Cobweb
Dripstone
Lavabucket
Arrows
Crossbow
Trap chests
Tripwire
Tripwire hook

## Gallery showcases what they look in-game
